overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a neon-lit bar. The player character walks through the entrance past arcade machines, approaches the bartender for interaction, surveys other patrons along the purple-lit counter, and exits through a rear stairwell. The environment features vibrant magenta and cyan neon lighting with futuristic cyberpunk aesthetics.

moving from entrance corridor into main bar area with visible counter

large structural concrete pillar dividing the entrance from bar area
purple and black zigzag geometric pattern on wall behind bar
green and blue neon-lit arcade cabinets against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a cyberpunk bar from a corridor, passing a woman in white pants walking toward the exit. The space opens to reveal a purple neon-lit bar counter on the right, concrete pillars on the left, and glowing arcade machines in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter interaction area with backlit shelves

events.description: slowing down and stopping at the bar counter
dialogue interaction prompt appears for the bartender

agents.ego_description: approaching the bartender and stopping at the counter where dialogue options appear

notable_agents.action: bartender with tattoos and sunglasses standing behind the counter polishing a glass

entered.detail: backlit shelves filled with various bottles behind the bartender
futuristic white stools with purple neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The player moves to the bar counter where a tattooed bartender stands behind purple neon-lit surfaces. Backlit bottle shelves line the wall behind the bar, and futuristic stools sit in front. A dialogue interaction prompt appears at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: seated bar area with multiple patrons

events.description: panning right along the bar counter to survey other patrons
additional standing patrons come into view at the far end of the bar

agents.ego_description: panning right to observe patrons seated and standing along the length of the bar

notable_agents.action: patron with spiky blonde hair sitting on bar stool facing the bartender
group of two men standing and conversing near the end of the counter

entered.detail: long horizontal cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling
flat screen display mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right along the bar, revealing cyan neon ceiling strips and additional patrons. A person with spiky hair sits on a stool in the foreground while two men converse further down the counter. The bar counter and bottle shelves shift to the left side of the frame as the view expands.

events.description: turning away from the bar area toward the exit doorway
ascending concrete stairs toward the exit

agents.ego_description: turning away from the bar and walking toward the exit staircase, leaving the neon-lit area

entered.detail: dark doorway leading to a stairwell
concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the bar, moving through a dark exit doorway into a narrow stairwell. The vibrant neon lighting fades as the scene transitions to a dimly lit concrete corridor with stairs leading upward, marking the exit from the commercial bar space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the vibrant, neon-soaked interior of a cyberpunk bar into a stark, dimly lit concrete exit. It begins as the camera enters from a corridor, passing a woman in white pants to reveal a wide space filled with glowing arcade machines and a purple-lit bar counter. As the camera approaches the counter, the view focuses on a tattooed bartender framed by backlit bottle shelves and futuristic stools before panning right to survey other patrons under cyan neon ceiling strips. The scene then shifts away from the colorful lounge, moving through a dark doorway where the vivid magenta and cyan lights rapidly fade. Finally, the camera enters a narrow, shadowed stairwell, transitioning from the commercial glow of the bar into a cold, concrete corridor leading upward.
